title: Asset
description: Represents a marketing asset in Content Builder. Assets include emails, templates, images, content blocks, and other content types used in marketing campaigns.

id.description: System-generated unique identifier for the asset

customerKey.description: Customer-defined unique key for the asset

content.description: Primary content of the asset, typically HTML or text depending on asset type

views.description: Channel-specific content views (e.g., html, text, subjectLine, preheader)

tags.description: Tags assigned to the asset for organization
